markdown:
#  User Guide Procore Connect For RFIs 
Table of Contents 
##  Permissions 
Learn which user permissions are required to take the described actions in this tool. 
#####  Important
Some actions that impact the Connection Manager tool are performed in other Procore tools. All permissions listed refer to the Connection Manager unless stated otherwise. 
![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18) Users can take the action with this permission level.
![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18) Users can take this action with this permission level AND one or more additional requirements, like [granular permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-permissions-in-procore-and-how-do-they-work).   
|  Approve or Reject Project Connection Request  [](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/connection-manager-project/tutorials/approve-or-reject-project-connection-requests)  |   |   |   | ![Check Green2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b22a36021ee4468068544df16ceed86/5bc08604910ccee3cb1cbde53ae7cd44/check-green2.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |  
|  Create an External RFI 360 Report  [](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/connection-manager-project/tutorials/Create-an-External-RFI-360-Report)  |   |   | ![Check Orange Simple](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/663bc820815bf6de6f8ad2cced5c5e8f/d4960a7f82ce5365ec73a9f79a3702b9/check-orange-simple.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Check Orange Simple](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/663bc820815bf6de6f8ad2cced5c5e8f/d4960a7f82ce5365ec73a9f79a3702b9/check-orange-simple.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | 
  * **Permissions for the RFI tool.**
  * Users also need 'Standard' level permissions or higher to the project's **360 Reporting** tool.

 |  
|  Configure Advanced Settings  [](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/connection-manager-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-connection-manager)  |   |   |   | ![Check Green2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b22a36021ee4468068544df16ceed86/5bc08604910ccee3cb1cbde53ae7cd44/check-green2.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
|  Disconnect a Connected Project  [](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/connection-manager-project/tutorials/disconnect-a-connected-project)  |   |   |   | ![Check Green2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b22a36021ee4468068544df16ceed86/5bc08604910ccee3cb1cbde53ae7cd44/check-green2.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
|  Initiate a Project Connection  [](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/connection-manager-project/tutorials/initiate-a-project-connection)  |   |   |   | ![Check Green2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b22a36021ee4468068544df16ceed86/5bc08604910ccee3cb1cbde53ae7cd44/check-green2.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
|  Link Internal and External RFIs on a Downstream Project  [](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/connection-manager-project/tutorials/link-internal-and-external-rfis)  |   |  ![Check Orange Simple](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/663bc820815bf6de6f8ad2cced5c5e8f/d4960a7f82ce5365ec73a9f79a3702b9/check-orange-simple.png?fm=webp&h=18) + View External Items  |  ![Check Orange Simple](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/663bc820815bf6de6f8ad2cced5c5e8f/d4960a7f82ce5365ec73a9f79a3702b9/check-orange-simple.png?fm=webp&h=18) + View External Items  | ![Check Green2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b22a36021ee4468068544df16ceed86/5bc08604910ccee3cb1cbde53ae7cd44/check-green2.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | 
  * **Permissions for the RFI tool.**
  * Users with Read Only or Standard permissions to the RFI tool must also have the ‘View External Items’ granular permission to the RFIs tool to Link Internal and External RFIs on a Downstream Project.

 |  
|  Quick Undo a Connected Project  [](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/connection-manager-project/tutorials/quick-undo-a-connected-project)  |   |   |   | ![Check Green2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b22a36021ee4468068544df16ceed86/5bc08604910ccee3cb1cbde53ae7cd44/check-green2.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
|  View External RFIs on a Downstream Project  [](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/connection-manager-project/tutorials/View-External-RFIs-on-a-Downstream-Project)  |   |  ![Check Orange Simple](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/663bc820815bf6de6f8ad2cced5c5e8f/d4960a7f82ce5365ec73a9f79a3702b9/check-orange-simple.png?fm=webp&h=18) + View External Items  |  ![Check Orange Simple](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/663bc820815bf6de6f8ad2cced5c5e8f/d4960a7f82ce5365ec73a9f79a3702b9/check-orange-simple.png?fm=webp&h=18) + View External Items  | ![Check Green2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b22a36021ee4468068544df16ceed86/5bc08604910ccee3cb1cbde53ae7cd44/check-green2.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |  Users must have one of the following permissions to the **RFIs** tool:
  * 'Admin'
  * 'Read Only' or 'Standard' level permissions with the ‘View External Items’ granular permission for RFIs.

 |  
|  View Project Connections  [](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/connection-manager-project/tutorials/view-project-connections)  |   | ![Check Green2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b22a36021ee4468068544df16ceed86/5bc08604910ccee3cb1cbde53ae7cd44/check-green2.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Check Green2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b22a36021ee4468068544df16ceed86/5bc08604910ccee3cb1cbde53ae7cd44/check-green2.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Check Green2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0b22a36021ee4468068544df16ceed86/5bc08604910ccee3cb1cbde53ae7cd44/check-green2.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |
